# Support

## Getting Help

- **Documentation** — Check the [README](../README.md) for setup and usage guides
- **Issues** — Open a [GitHub Issue](https://github.com/bilals2008/depot-pos/issues/new) for bugs or feature requests
- **Discussions** — Use GitHub Discussions for questions and community support

## Before Opening an Issue

1. Search existing issues to avoid duplicates
2. Provide clear steps to reproduce bugs
3. Include relevant logs, screenshots, or error messages
4. Specify your OS and app version
